title: 大阪杯の後に・ライバルの帰国

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kitasan Black blows past the competition in the
Osaka Hai. Her performance inspires Satono
Diamond as she prepares for the Satsuki Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Meanwhile, her rival Brusquement has returned
from a successful international racing tour.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kitasan Black sets the spring Tenno Sho as her
next goal, but she seems to be keeping a close
eye on Brusquement's aspirations as well.
